Problem

AI is the new search engine. Are you visible?

ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini and others are replacing Google for buying decisions. They pull answers from community discussions, review sites, and editorial content. The brands in those sources get recommended. The rest get ignored.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to common questions here

Get answers to common questions here

What is CrowdReply?

CrowdReply is the AI search visibility platform that helps brands monitor, engage, and grow their presence across AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude. We track how AI models see your brand, identify the citation sources they pull from, and give you the tools to engage on those platforms — so your brand becomes the one AI recommends. We combine analytics, social listening, and our proprietary Engagement Engine into one platform.

Why does AI search visibility matter for my brand?

How does CrowdReply improve my AI search rankings?
